headline: Meta (META) Launches Meta Compute To Sell AI Power Beyond Advertising

headline: Why the Current Selloff in Big Tech Stocks Is a Springboard for a New Rally
summary: The recent Big Tech correction is a healthy reset, not a market crash. Big Tech capex remains the S&P 500's core engine. With falling gas prices driving down headline CPI and an impending dovish Fed pivot, current market levels offer an ideal entry point for a new historic rally.

headline: Nvidia (NVDA) Backs Verkada And Brings In A Microsoft Veteran To Lead Sales
summary: NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) announced a new collaboration with Verkada to accelerate physical AI adoption in real world environments. NVIDIA will become a strategic investor in Verkada and work on AI search and safety applications for buildings and other physical spaces. The company also appointed former Microsoft executive Nicholas Parker as EVP, Worldwide Field Operations, signaling a change in its go to market leadership. NVIDIA enters this news cycle with its stock at $194.83 and very large...
